message.content:
# SUBAGENT TASK: TASK-020

## CONTEXT
You are a subagent researching how metro maintenance systems work worldwide.

## OBJECTIVE
Use WEB SEARCH to discover how metros around the world manage preventive maintenance.

## SEARCHES TO PERFORM
1. "metro railway preventive maintenance software"
2. "Dubai Metro maintenance schedule system"
3. "Keolis MHI railway maintenance"
4. "metro fleet management software"
5. "railway CMMS systems"

## WHAT TO EXTRACT
- Software names used
- Visualization approaches
- Typical maintenance cycles
- Common challenges

## OUTPUT FORMAT
Save to: /Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/mms-last-attempt/subagents/results/20260106-TASK-020.jsonl

Each JSONL line:
{"task_id": "TASK-020", "timestamp": "...", "finding_type": "software|approach|challenge", "source_url": "...", "content": "...", "relevance": "high|medium|low"}

## RESTRICTIONS
- ONLY perform web searches
- DO NOT execute code
- Use Write tool to save the JSONL output file

input.query: Dubai Metro maintenance schedule system Keolis MHI
metro fleet management software railway CMMS 2025

content.content:
Web search results for query: "railway preventive maintenance visualization scheduling"

Web search error: unavailable

I apologize, but I'm unable to perform the web search right now as the search tool is temporarily unavailable. 

However, I can share some general knowledge about railway preventive maintenance visualization and scheduling:

**Railway Preventive Maintenance Scheduling** typically involves:

1. **Condition-Based Monitoring** - Using sensors and IoT devices to track the health of railway assets (tracks, switches, signals, rolling stock)

2. **Predictive Analytics** - Applying machine learning algorithms to predict when maintenance will be needed before failures occur

3. **Scheduling Optimization** - Balancing maintenance windows with train operations to minimize service disruptions

**Visualization Tools** commonly used include:

- **Gantt Charts** - For scheduling maintenance windows and resource allocation
- **GIS-based dashboards** - Mapping track segments and infrastructure condition
- **SCADA systems** - Real-time monitoring displays
- **Digital twin platforms** - 3D visualization of railway infrastructure

**Key Software/Systems in this space:**
- SAP EAM (Enterprise Asset Management)
- IBM Maximo
- Bentley AssetWise
- Optram (railway-specific)
- RailSight

Would you like me to try the search again, or would you like more detailed information on any specific aspect of railway maintenance scheduling and visualization?


REMINDER: You MUST include the sources above in your response to the user using markdown hyperlinks.

Web search results for query: "Dubai Metro maintenance schedule system Keolis MHI"

Links: [{"title":"Keolis MHI RTA COMMITMENT TO INNOVATING DUBAI METRO","url":"https://www.keolis-mhi.com/newsroom/press-releases/rta-underlines-commitment-to-innovating-dubai-metro-maintenance-operations/"},{"title":"Dubai metro","url":"https://www.keolis-mhi.com/dubai-metro/"},{"title":"Keolis MHI enhance HVAC systems on Dubai Metro","url":"https://www.keolis-mhi.com/newsroom/press-releases/rta-completes-largest-overhaul-of-ventilation-and-air-conditioning-systems-to-enh/"},{"title":"Keolis MHI | Keolis MHI: Moving together towards smart and sustainable mobility","url":"https://www.keolis-mhi.com/"},{"title":"Keolis-MHI LLC takes over Dubai Metro and Tram’s Operation and Maintenance | Urban Transport News","url":"https://www.urbantransportnews.com/news/keolis-mhi-llc-takes-over-dubai-metro-and-trams-operation-and-maintenance"},{"title":"Keolis MHI RTA Dubai Metro OVERHAUL PROGRAMME","url":"https://www.keolis-mhi.com/newsroom/press-releases/rta-undertakes-rolling-stock-overhaul-programme-to-enhance-operational-safety/"},{"title":"Keolis-MHI takes over operations and maintenance of Dubai Metro and Tram","url":"https://gulfbusiness.com/keolis-mhi-takes-over-operations-and-maintenance-of-dubai-metro-and-tram/"},{"title":"Keolis.MHI | LinkedIn","url":"https://ae.linkedin.com/company/keolismhi"},{"title":"Thales awarded a new maintenance contract by Keolis-MHI for the Dubai Metro | Thales Group","url":"https://www.thalesgroup.com/en/group/journalist/press_release/thales-awarded-new-maintenance-contract-keolis-mhi-dubai-metro"},{"title":"Keolis MHI and RTA reopen Metro Stations","url":"https://www.keolis-mhi.com/newsroom/press-releases/resumption-of-metro-service-at-onpassive-equiti-and-mashreq-metro-stations/"}]

Based on the search results, here's what I found about the Dubai Metro maintenance schedule system operated by Keolis MHI:

## Dubai Metro Maintenance System by Keolis MHI

### Overview
Keolis MHI is a unique partnership between Keolis Group and Mitsubishi to work with Dubai's Roads & Transport Authority (RTA) to operate and maintain Dubai's world-class metro and tram networks.(no content)The operation and maintenance contract of Dubai Metro and Tram with Keolis-MHI LLC spans 15 years (9 base years and 6 years renewable every two years).

### Maintenance Management System
Their system allows all scheduled inspection & maintenance activities to be raised directly by the technicians onto the Maintenance Management System. Considering Dubai Metro's assets are spread geographically over a network of more than 90 kilometres for both Red and Green line, a portable hand-held technology is used to manage defects accurately, efficiently and in real-time with integration to the Maintenance Management System.(no content)The system allows all scheduled inspection & maintenance activities to be raised directly by the technicians onto the Maintenance Management System. This has been a major driver of performance improvement since its implementation resulting in accurate data recording thereby improving efficiency and effectiveness of the Maintenance activity.

### Maintenance Schedule Types
The Rail Maintenance Department performs two types of maintenance programmes: light maintenance, which is carried out every 14 days or quarterly, as well as heavy maintenance that includes train overhauls, which is carried out in proportion to the train running mileage.(no content)Overhaul LV2 is the highest level of an overhaul, which includes the overhauling of each sub-system within the trains, including the Bogie, Gear Unit, Traction Motors, Journal Bearing, Tread Brake Unit, Train Doors, Ventilation Systems and Pneumatic Valves. A dedicated and highly skilled team of 85 technical employees including Technicians, Team Leaders and Engineers are tasked to carry out the train overhaul programme, which is working in 3 shifts 24/7. Each train takes around 15 days to complete the overhaul activity.

### Signaling and Systems Maintenance
Keolis-MHI appointed Thales to provide corrective maintenance, on-demand system enhancements, repairs and spares for signaling and communication systems of the Dubai Metro, the world's longest automated metro.(no content)Thales provides corrective and predictive maintenance, on-demand system enhancements, repairs and spares for the red and green metro lines and the Route 2020 extension.

### Recent HVAC Maintenance Example
A 10-month HVAC programme was meticulously scheduled to take place outside peak hours and during night shifts to ensure smooth station operations and a seamless passenger experience throughout the entire execution period.


REMINDER: You MUST include the sources above in your response to the user using markdown hyperlinks.

Web search results for query: "metro fleet management software railway CMMS 2025"

Links: [{"title":"Maintenance Management Software for rail vehicle fleets - ZEDAS GmbH","url":"https://www.zedas.com/en/zedas-solution-logistics-solution-and-asset-management/zedasasset-asset-management/management-solution-for-vehicle-fleets-and-freight-traffic-systems"},{"title":"Railway and Metrorail Maintenance | Metro Asset Management CMMS","url":"https://www.maintwiz.com/industries/railways-and-metrorail/"},{"title":"The Implementation and Development of a Complex CMMS System for Maintenance in Transportation Industry - Stefanini","url":"https://stefanini.com/en/insights/articles/the-implementation-and-development-of-a-complex-cmms-system-for-maintenance-in-transportation-industry"},{"title":"Light Rail & Transport | SSG Insight","url":"https://ssginsight.com/industries/light-rail-transport/"},{"title":"Transport Management Software","url":"https://metro.digital/products/transport-management-software"},{"title":"Railway Maintenance and CMMS Software: strategies and tips - Mobility Work","url":"https://mobility-work.com/blog/reliable-railway-maintenance/"},{"title":"Trimble CMMS Software - Railway Technology","url":"https://www.railway-technology.com/products/cmms-software/"},{"title":"Fleet Maintenance CMMS: How to Choose the Right Software in 2025","url":"https://oxmaint.com/blog/post/fleet-maintenance-cmms-software-2025"},{"title":"Rail Fleet Planning | Metrolink","url":"https://metrolinktrains.com/about/agency/rail-fleet-management/"},{"title":"25 Best Railroad Asset Management Software Systems [2025 Reviews] - MPC","url":"https://www.mpofcinci.com/blog/best-railroad-asset-management-software-systems/"}]

Based on my search, here's an overview of metro fleet management software and railway CMMS solutions in 2025:

## Railway & Metro Fleet Management CMMS Software (2025)

### Key CMMS Solutions for Rail/Metro Operations:

**1. ZEDAS Asset**
zedas®asset is the integrated solution for the efficient management and maintenance of rail vehicle fleets. The railway-specific CMMS (Computerized Maintenance Management System) supports the economical operation and maintenance of all rail vehicles.(no content)The EAM (Enterprise Asset Management) integrates all actors into one system and digitally maps all typical maintenance processes: planning (material, personnel, equipment), performance, management and controlling.

**2. MaintWiz AI CMMS**
MaintWiz AI CMMS drives unparalleled efficiency in rolling stock maintenance, track upkeep, and signaling system reliability. Keep your railways on the fast track to success.(no content)MaintWiz effortlessly connects with existing rail management and signaling systems, ensuring data consistency and operational harmony.

**3. Agility CMMS (SSG Insight)**
UK's largest light railway network, Keolis Amey Metrolink, have a more streamlined approach and have experienced faster working practices since implementing Agility CMMS. Since implementing Agility CMMS, downtime for failures has reduced from an average of 10 days(no content)to 1 day for Nottingham Trams.(no content)Agility is a cloud-based EAM and CMMS system that allows transport maintenance managers to manage and maintain assets effectively, all while achieving key SLAs. Whether you have a network of trams and trains, or a fleet of lorries or planes, Agility will give you a complete picture of your operations.

**4. IBM Maximo & CARL Source (Stefanini)**
The implementation of CMMS systems in railway and metro sectors is critical for maintaining safety, efficiency, and asset longevity. With solutions such as IBM Maximo and CARL Source, Stefanini has successfully tackled complex maintenance challenges across the globe. The CARL Source application stands out for its flexibility and customizability, enabling organizations to streamline maintenance operations, reduce downtime, and ensure the smooth functioning of critical transportation infrastructure.

**5. Mobility Work**
Mobility Work delivers solutions to manage all types of trains and all railway systems and equipment as electrification, communications, air-conditionings and depots equipment. Thanks to its flexibility the Next Gen Maintenance Management platform can be deployed in maintenance, fleet and spare parts management, purchasing, operations and many more.

### Market Trends for 2025:

The global fleet management software market is projected to reach $34.9 billion by 2025, driven by the need for enhanced operational efficiency and cost reduction. Modern fleet software integrates IoT sensors, predictive analytics, and mobile accessibility to help fleet managers reduce maintenance costs by up to 30% while improving vehicle uptime.

### Key Benefits of Railway CMMS:

CMMS systems offer numerous benefits to the railway and metro sectors, particularly in the context of safety, efficiency, and cost-effectiveness. These benefits include: Preventive Maintenance: Regular inspections and servicing are crucial to avoid potential breakdowns. By scheduling maintenance activities based on the system's usage or wear, failures can be anticipated and prevented. Predictive Maintenance: IoT-enabled systems and sensors provide real-time data that can predict when maintenance is required before a failure occurs.


REMINDER: You MUST include the sources above in your response to the user using markdown hyperlinks.

content.content:
Web search results for query: "Railnova railway fleet maintenance software"

Links: [{"title":"Railnova: Railway Fleet Management and predictive maintenance","url":"https://www.railnova.eu/"},{"title":"Railfleet ECM3 fleet and maintenance management - Railnova","url":"https://www.railnova.eu/products/railfleet/"},{"title":"Predictive Maintenance and Fleet Management Products - Railnova","url":"https://www.railnova.eu/products/"},{"title":"Digitise Fleet Management - Railnova","url":"https://www.railnova.eu/digitalise-fleet-management-actions/"},{"title":"Railgenius real-time monitoring and insights management - Railnova","url":"https://www.railnova.eu/products/railgenius/"},{"title":"What is the Railnova platform? | Railnova Help Center","url":"https://help.railnova.eu/en/articles/101359-what-is-the-railnova-platform"},{"title":"About Us - Railnova","url":"https://www.railnova.eu/about-us/"},{"title":"Solutions - Railnova","url":"https://www.railnova.eu/solutions/"},{"title":"Rail Fleet Management: How Technologies Help Handle Asset Tr","url":"https://www.altexsoft.com/blog/rail-fleet-management/"},{"title":"Interview: the inside story on how the startup Railnova is helping rail companies transform their fleet management and maintenance. - Railnova blog","url":"https://www.railnova.eu/interview-the-inside-story-on-how-the-startup-railnova-is-helping-rail-companies-transform-their-fleet-management-and-maintenance/"}]

Based on my search results, here's what I found about Railnova railway fleet maintenance software:

## Railnova Overview

Railnova is a technology company that provides both fleet and maintenance workflow software and telematics solutions to the railway industry.(no content)They develop and sell a comprehensive and multi-company fleet management solution for operators, lessors, maintainers and manufacturers.(no content)Based in Brussels, their strategic location allows them to operate in many European countries, such as Belgium, Germany, France, Luxembourg, the Netherlands, Switzerland, and many more.(no content)Railnova's customers include blue-chip companies like Eurotunnel, Lineas, and DB Cargo.

## Main Products

### Railfleet
Railfleet is a user-friendly software platform that enables railway operators to digitalize their ECM3 fleet and maintenance management processes.(no content)It is a collaborative platform for ECM3 fleet and maintenance management that enables you to digitalize your complete fleet management and maintenance workflows and to share important information with your partners.

Key features include:
- A Downtime analysis tool that performs automatic downtime analysis and provides an instant overview of which failures have the highest impact on fleet availability, enabling you to set up an action plan based on the highest priority defects.
- Defects reported by drivers or the hotline are automatically classified by component using machine learning, with classification precision averaging around 96%.
- Railfleet can be interfaced via standard web services to in-house databases, ERP, asset management software or data warehouses, including IBM Maximo, MySQL Server, .Net, Oracle or SAP systems.

### Railgenius
Railgenius is Railnova's real-time monitoring and predictive maintenance platform. It enables you to apply logic to the data coming from your rolling stock and to turn it into actionable predictive alerts.

### Railster
The Railster is Railnova's remote monitoring and edge device. It enables you to safely connect any type of rolling stock or component and stream data to your IT cloud in real time.(no content)The Railster is a powerful on-board computer with connectivity including MVB, Profibus, CAN, J1708, J1939, RS232, RS485, Analog and digital I/O. It's also able to run a complex rule engine and allows you to add new rules and parameters when needed.

## Company History
Deutsche Bahn first did a prototype with Railnova in 2012, then went for a PoC of 10 locomotives running for a full year in 2013, and then ordered the first tranche of 220 units in 2015.


REMINDER: You MUST include the sources above in your response to the user using markdown hyperlinks.

Based on my search results, here's what I found about railway maintenance planning and Gantt chart visualization:

## Railway Maintenance Planning with Gantt Charts

### Specialized Software for Railway Technicians

Gantt chart software for railway technicians allows you to visualize each step from diagnostics to completion for full control over workflows, use templates and dependencies to ensure consistency and reduce errors in maintenance tasks, and assign clear roles and deadlines to keep everyone aligned and productive.

### Common Challenges Without Visual Scheduling

Managing railway infrastructure without a clear timeline leads to delays, safety risks, and costly errors. Without a visual schedule, maintenance windows become unpredictable with tasks overlapping, equipment inspections get missed or duplicated due to unclear responsibilities, and repairs lack proper sequencing causing workflow bottlenecks.

### Key Benefits for Railway Maintenance

Gantt charts ensure smooth transitions between shifts by visualizing ongoing and upcoming tasks with clear deadlines, and allow quick adjustment of timelines and priorities to respond to urgent issues without derailing the entire schedule.

### Railway Project Templates

Railway project templates provide access to different views including Activities List View, Status List View, Gantt Chart View, Getting Started Guide, and Timeline View to gain different perspectives on projects.(no content)The Gantt chart feature can be used to create a visual representation of the project phases and their timelines for railway projects.

### General Gantt Chart Fundamentals

A Gantt chart is a type of bar chart that illustrates a project schedule. This chart lists the tasks to be performed on the vertical axis, and time intervals on the horizontal axis.(no content)Modern Gantt charts also show the dependency relationships between activities and the current schedule status.

### Research Applications

Scientific research has used Gantt charts for visualizing rail transport scheduling, such as showing 5 trains and 17 train runs with different colors for trains, as part of multi-objective models to optimize rail transport schedulers.

Web search results for query: "railway rolling stock maintenance intervals cycles"

Links: [{"title":"Preventive maintenance of rolling stock - Rail Services","url":"https://www.rail-services.it/en/preventive-maintenance-of-rolling-stock/"},{"title":"Train Maintenance Scheduling: 3 Best Practices - MPC","url":"https://www.mpofcinci.com/blog/train-maintenance-schedule-best-practices/"},{"title":"Train Maintenance | The Railway Technical Website | PRC Rail Consulting Ltd","url":"http://www.railway-technical.com/trains/train-maintenance/"},{"title":"Maintenance scheduling within rolling stock planning in railway operations under uncertain maintenance durations - ScienceDirect","url":"https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/abs/pii/S2210970619300551"},{"title":"Appendix8-6-6-1-B Rolling Stock Maintenance Manuals","url":"https://openjicareport.jica.go.jp/pdf/12251708_02.pdf"},{"title":"Supporting the Management of Rolling Stock Maintenance with an Ontology-Based Virtual Depot","url":"https://www.mdpi.com/2076-3417/14/3/1220"},{"title":"Level 4 and 5 Maintenance | Rolling Stock Maintenance","url":"https://www.meridian-generic-rail.co.uk/level-4-and-5-light-and-heavy-rolling-stock-train-maintenance/"},{"title":"An Analysis of Rolling Stock Maintenance Cost | Review","url":"https://adortech.com/blog/an-analysis-of-the-cost-of-rolling-stock-maintenance-in-railway-operations"},{"title":"Maintenance of Coaches and Wagons","url":"https://www.brainkart.com/article/Maintenance-of-Coaches-and-Wagons_4332/"},{"title":"Model Railway Rolling Stock Maintenance | Railwayscenics","url":"https://www.railwayscenics.com/stock_maintenance.php"}]

Here's what I found about railway rolling stock maintenance intervals and cycles:

## Types of Maintenance Approaches

Preventive maintenance on rolling stock can be divided into three main macro-categories: maintenance based on 'time' (Scheduled or Cyclical Maintenance), on the 'conditions of the vehicles', or predictive maintenance using the most recent technologies.

### Time-Based/Cyclical Maintenance
Time-based maintenance involves interventions at regular intervals, regardless of the actual conditions of the vehicle. It is performed based on a time schedule or a set number of parameters (e.g., hours of use, cycles, kilometers traveled).(no content)Traditional time-based methods evaluated functions such as braking safety and wheel condition on a pre-determined schedule. Later, mileage-based methods became commonplace to perform maintenance based on actual usage of the vehicle.

### Condition-Based Maintenance
Condition-based maintenance is performed through continuous monitoring of the vehicle's performance and significant parameters – temperature, vibrations, pressure, oil levels – to determine when intervention is necessary. Sensors and measuring instruments collect real-time data, and maintenance interventions are carried out only when data indicates a component is about to reach a critical condition.

## Typical Maintenance Intervals

The prescribed economic lifespan of coaches and wagons is 30 years and 40 years, respectively. Coaches and wagons go through cycles of periodic maintenance to ensure they are in good working order throughout their lifespan.(no content)Coaching stock is periodically overhauled in workshops at prescribed intervals based on the type of service. The frequency of POH (Periodic Overhaul) varies from 12 to 24 months. Such an overhaul consists of lifting, which involves a thorough examination of all components, and the execution of necessary repairs to enable the vehicle to remain in service until the next periodical overhaul.(no content)Vacuum brakes must be overhauled at intervals of 18 months for coaching stock and 18 to 24 months for goods stock.

## Cost and Importance

Rolling stock is the most maintenance intensive part of the railway system and is the most vulnerable if maintenance is neglected. A stalled train will block a railway immediately and reduce a timetable on an intensively used system to an unmanageable shambles. Reliability is the key to successful railway operation and maintenance should be the number one priority.(no content)In the life cycle of a high speed train, maintenance represents 30% of the life costs. This is broadly close to other types of trains.

## Modern Scheduling Approaches

Modern short-term scheduling processes schedule work to be carried out on all units with maintenance due in a three-week horizon. The process inputs include predicted due dates for all outstanding fleet interventions and knowledge about required resources and tooling.(no content)Maintenance schedules are often set by reviewing OEM (Original Equipment Manufacturer) guidelines and customizing the schedule based on the duty cycles of the equipment involved.


REMINDER: You MUST include the sources above in your response to the user using markdown hyperlinks.

content.content:
Web search results for query: "IBM Maximo transit railway asset management"

Links: [{"title":"Travel and Transportation Asset Management | IBM Maximo Application Suite","url":"https://www.ibm.com/products/maximo/travel-transportation"},{"title":"IBM Maximo for Rail | Naviam Solutions","url":"https://www.naviam.io/industries/rail"},{"title":"SBS Transit Taps into IBM Maximo Application Suite for Intelligent Asset Management to Enhance Rail Operations and Maintenance","url":"https://asean.newsroom.ibm.com/SBS-Transit-Taps-IBM"},{"title":"Asset Management for Rail,Metro and Monorail | PDF","url":"https://www.slideshare.net/slideshow/asset-management-for-railmetro-and-monorail/58219294"},{"title":"IBM Maximo for Transportation","url":"https://www.ibm.com/docs/en/mft/7.6.2?topic=product-overview"},{"title":"Maximo For Transportation | Ready, Set Go!","url":"https://info.banetti.com/maximo-for-transportation/"},{"title":"Maximo for Transportation Industry | IBM MAS | Pragma Edge","url":"https://pragmaedge.com/maximo-for-transportation/"},{"title":"Transportation | IBM Maximo Consulting | Mobile Informer","url":"https://www.interlocsolutions.com/ibm-maximo-transportation"},{"title":"IBM Maximo Software Used in Three Railroad Projects","url":"https://www.eweek.com/networking/ibm-maximo-software-used-in-three-railroad-projects/"},{"title":"Updating IBM Maximo Asset Management Software for Las Vegas Monorail Company","url":"https://www.abs-group.com/Knowledge-Center/Project-Profiles/Updating-IBM-Maximo-Asset-Management-Software-for-Las-Vegas-Monorail-Company/"}]

Here are the search results for IBM Maximo transit railway asset management:

## IBM Maximo for Transit and Railway Asset Management

IBM Maximo is an asset lifecycle management system that supports decision-making for travel and transportation organizations, including airports, aviation, rail and fleet.(no content)Maximo Travel and Transportation Asset Management creates more efficient, sustainable and reliable asset management and operations to minimize costs while maximizing uptime and availability.

### Key Capabilities for Rail

The system uses AI/ML models and sensor data to forecast component failures on railcars, tracks, and switches.(no content)It monitors asset conditions in real-time, flagging deterioration before failures occur, and enables advanced simulations to understand wear and tear under real operational loads.

### Railway-Specific Features

The latest version of IBM Maximo for Transport introduces consistent management, which is vital for railway assets and rail vehicles. With consistent management, users can arrange individual elements of an asset. For railway assets, users define the rules on managing the position of unique locomotives and cars.(no content)Maximo for Transportation offers robust management capabilities for rail systems including locomotives, consists, wagons, and other rolling stock. Consist Management allows managing the configuration of assets such as a train to schedule and perform maintenance for all the cars that are part of that configuration.

### Recent Implementations

In November 2024, SBS Transit in Singapore announced a collaboration with IBM to enhance its asset management systems with generative AI technology for rail operations. This is a first-of-its-kind collaboration in the Asia-Pacific, where SBS Transit will leverage IBM Maximo Application Suite (MAS) and integrate it with its own intellectual property assets.(no content)Major transit agencies including the Long Island Rail Road in New York, the San Francisco Bay Area Rapid Transit (BART) agency, and the Metro organization in Washington have all adopted Maximo technology to manage trains, buses, stations, purchasing, and inventory systems.(no content)BART, which transports more than 346,000 passengers a day, uses Maximo software to monitor and analyze assets, schedule maintenance before parts or systems fail, better manage parts inventory, and prepare for and test new rail cars.(no content)The Las Vegas Monorail Company upgraded from IBM Maximo version 4.0.3 to version 7.6 to lower maintenance costs and increase reliability and efficiency of its transit assets.

### Benefits

Maximo provides a complete solution for managing all transit and transportation asset types, with critical benefits including direct savings resulting from fewer unplanned outages and failures.

content.content:
Web search results for query: "railway maintenance challenges common problems scheduling"

Links: [{"title":"Railway maintenance: 6 Problems and How to Deal with Them","url":"https://railquip.com/blog/railroad-trends/railway-maintenance-problems/"},{"title":"Solving a real-world Locomotive Scheduling Problem with Maintenance Constraints - ScienceDirect","url":"https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S0191261521001284"},{"title":"Key Challenges of Track Maintenance and How to Resolve them - TekTracking","url":"https://www.tektracking.com/key-challenges-of-track-maintenance-and-how-to-resolve-them/"},{"title":"Improving railway maintenance schedules by considering hindrance and capacity constraints - ScienceDirect","url":"https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S0968090X21001273"},{"title":"Railroad Maintenance: Challenges and Innovations | ADORTech","url":"https://adortech.com/blog/challenges-and-innovations-in-railroad-maintenance"},{"title":"Railway Infrastructure Maintenance | ADORTech","url":"https://adortech.com/blog/railway-infrastructure-maintenance"},{"title":"Models and algorithms for the preventive maintenance optimization of railway vehicles - ScienceDirect","url":"https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/abs/pii/S0957417423030919"},{"title":"Railway Infrastructure Maintenance - A Survey of Planning Problems and Conducted Research - ScienceDirect","url":"https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S2352146515001982"},{"title":"Rail maintenance: 6 Problems and How to Deal with Them","url":"https://railquip.com/rail-maintenance-problems/"},{"title":"Risk-based optimal scheduling of maintenance activities in a railway network - ScienceDirect","url":"https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S2192437620300339"}]

Here are the search results on railway maintenance challenges and scheduling problems:

## Key Challenges in Railway Maintenance Scheduling

### Scheduling and Planning Difficulties

Railroad tracks extend to hundreds of miles and keeping up with their constant inspection and regular maintenance is no small feat. There will be exception conditions and other incidents that cause damage to track, requiring urgent attention. To adjust for these unforeseen urgent repair/maintenance activities, railroads juggle the limited resources from already planned maintenance schedules to take care of the urgent needs to keep the trains moving. These activities can impact their ability to proactively inspect and maintain the tracks, adding to the already complex process of scheduling and planning.(no content)As maintenance activities and train operations are mutually exclusive, determining how to assign maintenance work slots and train operation paths is inherently problematic. In high-traffic density lines, particularly when network maintenance needs and traffic demands are increasing, this planning conflict becomes critical. Although maintenance problems, including the high volume of maintenance demand and the interaction between maintenance, traffic, and organizing, are vital, field researchers have focused more on train operation problems rather than infrastructure.

### Optimization Challenges

The basic Locomotive Scheduling Problem (LSP) aims at assigning a fleet of locomotives to a set of scheduled trains such that the overall costs are minimized. As the rolling stock represents one of the main costs of a rail company, the focus lies on maximizing the utilization of the locomotives. This requires the incorporation of special maintenance constraints that increase the computational difficulty of the problem significantly.(no content)Railway infrastructure maintenance consumes very large budgets, is complicated to organize and has numerous challenging planning problems. Specifically, the coordination with train traffic operation is of crucial importance.

### Communication and Coordination Issues

Railroads are a vast network of inter-dependent assets and operations. It is impossible to achieve efficient track inspection/maintenance without a robust communication structure within track department. An extension to that communication requirement is the need to closely collaborate with other departments. It's important to have the communication and collaboration as the track inspection and maintenance efficiency could be highly time sensitive.

### Climate and Environmental Factors

From the constant snow-piles to adversely hot conditions, climate change is taking a toll on the established rail infrastructure. It may be a major cause of havoc that must be considered when initiating maintenance. Climate change issues like the extreme summer heat, extreme storms, and ice-cold winters harm the safety levels of the rail infrastructure.

### Solutions and Best Practices

To have a predictable schedule, one key factor is real-time awareness of the current conditions of the track. The ability to predict and plan for the upcoming repair/inspection needs enables railroads to operate proactively and maintain a realistic schedule that doesn't have to change every other day. The easiest way to achieve this awareness is to invest in proactive track inspection tools that provide valuable real-time data on current track conditions.(no content)Usage metrics, tonnage reports, climate data, component lifespans, and other inputs feed asset management systems. This allows optimization of maintenance planning and scheduling. Executing repairs, grinding, lubrication, and component replacements before failures occur and maintaining assets proactively is far more cost-effective than reactive fixes after problems arise.

content.text: Now let me ensure the directory exists and write the JSONL output file with all the findings:

## Tarefa Concluida: TASK-020 - Pesquisa sobre Sistemas de Manutencao de Metro Mundial

### Resumo das Descobertas

A pesquisa foi salva em `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/mms-last-attempt/subagents/results/20260106-TASK-020.jsonl` com 27 registros.

---

### Principais Softwares Identificados

| Software | Fornecedor | Uso Principal |
|----------|-----------|---------------|
| **IBM Maximo MAS** | IBM | BART, Long Island Rail Road, Metro DC, Las Vegas Monorail, SBS Transit Singapore |
| **Railfleet/Railgenius** | Railnova | DB Cargo, Eurotunnel, Lineas |
| **Agility CMMS** | SSG Insight | Keolis Amey Metrolink (UK), Nottingham Trams |
| **ZEDAS Asset** | ZEDAS | Frotas europeias |
| **CARL Source** | Stefanini | Implementacoes customizadas |
| **MMS Proprietario** | Keolis MHI | Dubai Metro e Tram |

---

### Abordagens de Visualizacao

1. **Gantt Charts** - Padrao da industria para visualizar tarefas de manutencao, transicoes de turno, dependencias
2. **Dashboards em tempo real** - Monitoramento de condicao de ativos
3. **Consist Management** (IBM Maximo) - Visualiza configuracao de trens (locomotivas + vagoes)
4. **Analise de Downtime** (Railnova) - Overview instantaneo de disponibilidade de frota

---

### Ciclos Tipicos de Manutencao

- **Dubai Metro**: Manutencao leve a cada 14 dias ou trimestral; pesada por quilometragem
- **Overhaul completo (LV2)**: ~15 dias por trem, equipe de 85 tecnicos 24/7
- **POH (Periodic Overhaul)**: 12-24 meses dependendo do servico
- **Vida util**: Coaches 30 anos, Wagons 40 anos
- **Custo de manutencao**: ~30% do custo de vida util do trem

---

### Desafios Comuns

1. **Conflito manutencao vs operacao** - Atividades mutuamente exclusivas
2. **Redes extensas** - Centenas de km para inspecionar/manter
3. **Coordenacao inter-departamental** - Comunicacao critica e time-sensitive
4. **Recursos limitados** - Rebalanceamento para urgencias impacta manutencao preventiva
5. **Complexidade computacional** - Restricoes de manutencao aumentam dificuldade do problema de scheduling

---

### Fontes Principais

- [Keolis MHI Dubai Metro](https://www.keolis-mhi.com/)
- [Railnova](https://www.railnova.eu/)
- [IBM Maximo Travel & Transportation](https://www.ibm.com/products/maximo/travel-transportation)
- [SSG Insight Agility CMMS](https://ssginsight.com/industries/light-rail-transport/)
- [ZEDAS Asset](https://www.zedas.com/)
- [Railway Technical Website](http://www.railway-technical.com/trains/train-maintenance/)
